title: Release Exists, Implementation Not Found
claim: Release notes for a Rust package state a behavioral/implementation change; the manifest version was advanced.

observed_evidence.detail: Package version advanced in the manifest.

missing_evidence.detail: No source change corresponding to the claimed behavior was observed.
No observable behavior change was found for the claimed release.

required_action: Provide an implementation diff that supports the release claim, or revise the release notes (for example, as an explicit metadata-only release).
notes: Synthetic, generalized example. No third-party project is named. A documented metadata-only or provenance-repair release would not trigger AICE-605; the incident applies only because the release narrative implies a functional delta that cannot be observed.
